title: World War I Nationalisms
symbolicOrderName: World War I Nationalisms symbolic order
symbolicOrderDefinition: Draft operational shorthand for the durable shared meanings, legitimacy claims, memory, obligation, and sacrifice logic associated with World War I Nationalisms.

theoryTest: Tests the relationship among symbolic-order strength, crisis pressure, corrigibility, and sacrifice.
